name: Ad Lead Capture — Meta & Google Lead Forms
description: n8n Workflow 5: Receives leads from Meta Lead Forms and Google Lead Forms via webhook (/webhook/ad-lead), detects source platform, normalizes into common format (firstName, lastName, email, phone, source, campaign, adName, formId, vehicleInterest, consent), deduplicates against CRM (Activix or GHL), creates new leads or updates existing ones, triggers Instant Response workflow for new leads, and sends Slack notifications. CASL implied consent with 6-month window enforced.

nodes.name: Ad Lead Webhook
nodes.purpose: Receives POST at /webhook/ad-lead from LeadsBridge, Facebook Lead Ads, or Google Lead Form Extensions.

nodes.name: Detect Source
nodes.purpose: Determines if payload is from Meta Lead Form or Google Lead Form based on payload structure (lead_id/form_id/page_id = Meta, gcl_id/campaign_id/user_column_data = Google).

nodes.name: Normalize Lead
nodes.purpose: Extracts into common format: firstName, lastName, email, phone, source, campaign, adName, formId, vehicleInterest, consent (implied CASL 6-month), timestamp.

nodes.name: Deduplicate
nodes.purpose: Checks CRM (Activix or GHL based on CRM_PROVIDER env var) for existing lead by email then phone. Sets _isNew flag.

nodes.name: New Lead?
nodes.purpose: Routes to New Lead branch (true output 0) or Existing Lead branch (false output 1).

nodes.name: Create Lead in CRM

parameters.url: Dynamic: Activix POST /v2/leads or GHL POST /contacts/ based on CRM_PROVIDER

nodes.purpose: Creates lead in CRM. Activix: type=web, emails[], phones[], source, campaign, vehicles[], consent. GHL: firstName, lastName, email, phone, source, tags, locationId.

nodes.name: Trigger Instant Response

parameters.url: POST to /webhook/activix-lead-webhook with normalized lead data

nodes.purpose: Triggers Workflow 1 (Instant Lead Response) by POSTing normalized lead data to its webhook endpoint.

nodes.name: Log New Lead

parameters.jsCode: Logs new lead event with PII-redacted email/phone, CRM ID, consent info.

nodes.purpose: Logs new lead creation event with PII redaction.

nodes.name: Update Existing Lead

parameters.url: Dynamic: Activix PUT /v2/leads/:id or GHL PUT /contacts/:id based on CRM_PROVIDER

nodes.purpose: Updates existing CRM lead with new source/campaign info. Activix: comment with details. GHL: tags + custom fields.

parameters.jsCode: Logs duplicate detection with PII-redacted email, existing CRM lead ID.

nodes.name: Slack Notify New Lead
nodes.purpose: Sends Slack notification with new lead summary: name, source, campaign, vehicle interest, CRM ID, consent status, instant response trigger confirmation.

nodes.name: Slack Notify Duplicate
nodes.purpose: Sends Slack notification for duplicate lead: name, source, campaign, existing CRM ID, action taken.

nodes.name: Respond OK
nodes.purpose: Returns 200 OK to the webhook caller with processing status.

flow_summary.new_lead_path: Webhook -> Detect Source -> Normalize -> Dedup -> IF(new) -> Create CRM -> Trigger Instant Response -> Log -> Slack -> Respond OK
flow_summary.existing_lead_path: Webhook -> Detect Source -> Normalize -> Dedup -> IF(existing) -> Update CRM -> Log Duplicate -> Slack -> Respond OK
flow_summary.error_handling: CRM calls retry 3x with 3s delay. Slack has continueOnFail. Dedup defaults to new on CRM search failure. Validation rejects leads missing both email and phone.
flow_summary.consent: CASL implied consent, 6-month window from form submission date.
